# Luminary Guardian — WvW Zerg Support Guide

The Luminary is a **boon support Guardian** that runs in your subgroup as a stability engine, condition cleanser, Aegis applicator, and Quickness/Fury source — all wrapped in enough Concentration to make its boons meaningful. It sits at the crossroads of support and damage, dipping into respectable spike through [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] and spear.

---

## Gear at a Glance

| Piece | Stat |
|---|---|
| Armor (6 pieces) | Diviner's (Power / Precision / Ferocity / Concentration) |
| Jewelry (rings, accessories) | Wanderer's (Power / Vitality / Toughness / Concentration) |
| Amulet + Back | Commander's (Power / Precision / Toughness / Concentration) |
| Weapons | Wanderer's |
| Rune (6x) | [[item:Superior Rune of Fireworks]] (+175 Power, +25% Boon Duration) |
| Infusions (18x) | [[item:Concentration WvW Infusion]] (+5 Concentration each = +90 total, −1% damage from guards) |
| Food | Spiced Peppercorn Cheesecake (ascended feast) |
| Utility | [[item:Magnanimous Maintenance Oil]] (Concentration = 3% of Vitality + 3% of Toughness) |
| Relic | Relic of the Brawler |

**Why this stat mix?** Diviner's powers up your damage and crits while giving Concentration; Wanderer's on jewelry and weapons gives survivability (Vitality + Toughness) which the Maintenance Oil then converts *back into Concentration* — so your durability directly increases your boon uptime. The Fireworks rune and infusion stack push boon duration even further.

---

## Weapons

| Set | Weapons | Sigils |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Spear | [[item:Superior Sigil of Fire]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] |
| 2 | Mace / Shield | [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Bloodlust]] |

The **spear** is your primary weapon — it is a "radiant weapon" for the Luminary spec, meaning equipping it procs [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] and cuts virtue cooldowns. The **mace/shield** is your defensive set for tight spots and blocks. Bloodlust stacks on kills; in a WvW zerg you'll cap 25 stacks (250 bonus Power) within the first few engagements — never lose them.

---

## Traits Explained

### Zeal
- [[trait:Fiery Wrath]] — +5% strike damage to burning foes. Synergizes with Fire sigil procs.
- [[trait:Zealous Blade]] — +120 Power baseline. Simple raw stat.
- [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — When aegis *you applied* blocks an attack, it explodes for AoE damage (240 radius). Since you're constantly applying Aegis to your subgroup via [[skill:"Advance!"]] and F3 passive, this fires passively and often.

### Virtues
- [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] — +7% strike damage while you have Aegis, and +7% while above 90% HP. Aegis is nearly permanent on you through [[skill:"Advance!"]] and F3 passive — treat this as a persistent damage buff.
- [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] — Activating Virtue of Resolve (F2) removes **3 conditions** from 5 nearby allies in a 600 range radius. This is your burst cleanse panic button.
- [[trait:Indomitable Courage]] — Activating Virtue of Courage (F3) grants **3 stacks of Stability (4s)** to 5 nearby allies in 600 range and breaks your stun. F3's passive also grants Aegis to nearby allies every 30 seconds automatically.

### Luminary (Elite Spec)
- [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] — Every time you use a Stance, it grants **3s Protection** to affected allies and **3s Blind** to enemies. Two of your skills are stances, and your heal is a stance, so this fires very frequently.
- [[trait:Purging Light]] — Using your heal skill gives you Light Aura and removes **1 condition** from 5 nearby allies (300 range). Light Aura also reduces incoming condition damage by 10%.
- [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Equipping a radiant weapon (your spear) reduces virtue cooldowns: **4s off F1, 3s off F2, 2s off F3**. Every weapon swap to spear shaves time off your virtues. This is the core spec mechanic — see rotation below.

---

## Skills Explained

| Skill | Type | What it Does |
|---|---|---|
| [[skill:Resolute Stance]] | Heal / Stance (30s) | Heals you for ~6,550, heals 5 allies for ~3,350, removes **3 conditions** from allies in 360 range. With [[trait:Shimmering Stances]]: also grants 3s Protection to allies and Blinds nearby enemies. |
| [[skill:"Advance!"]] | Shout (2 charges, 24s each) | Grants **Aegis + Swiftness** (20s) to 5 allies in 600 range. 2 charges — very spammable. |
| [[skill:Valorous Stance]] | Stance (25s) | Grants **5 stacks of Stability (4s) + Protection** to 5 allies in 300 range. While active, heals allies whenever you grant them boons. With [[trait:Shimmering Stances]]: Protection extends to 7s and Blinds enemies. |
| [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] | Shout (24s) | **Stun break.** Grants **5 stacks of Stability (6s) + Resolution (5s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |
| [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] | Elite Shout (30s) | Grants **Quickness (3s) + Fury (10s) + Superspeed (4s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |

---

## Virtues (F-Skills)

- **F1 (Virtue of Justice)** — Passive: periodically burns nearby enemies. Active: applies burning to all attacks briefly.
- **F2 (Virtue of Resolve)** — With [[trait:Absolute Resolve]]: removes **3 conditions** from 5 allies in 600 range. Passive regen is also 25% stronger. Use this as a burst cleanse when your subgroup is being bombed with conditions.
- **F3 (Virtue of Courage)** — With [[trait:Indomitable Courage]]: grants **3x Stability (4s)** + stun break to 5 allies in 600 range. Passive Aegis application every 30s automatically.

---

## The Core Mechanic: Radiant Weapon Swapping

[[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] is the heartbeat of this build. Every time you swap **to your spear** (set 1), it reduces all three virtue cooldowns (4s/3s/2s). This means:

1. **Engage on spear** → virtues immediately get a CD cut
2. **Dump support cooldowns** (Valorous Stance → Stand Your Ground! → virtue F3)
3. **Weapon swap to mace/shield** if you need to block or fight in melee
4. **Swap back to spear** when ready → virtues get another cut, they may be ready again
5. **Repeat**

The faster your virtues come back, the more Stability and condition cleanse you pump into your subgroup. Don't idle on one weapon set.

---

## Priority Order in a Fight

Treat this as a rough priority — react to what your subgroup needs:

1. **Stability first.** Rotate [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] → F3 actively to keep stacks up. In a zerg push, stability loss means your party gets CC'd and dies in the blob. These three sources give you overlapping windows.
2. **Swap to spear** whenever you can to trim virtue CDs.
3. **Aegis cycling.** [[skill:"Advance!"]] has 2 charges on ~24s each — use them on CD, don't hoard. Every aegis you put on someone could proc [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] for free AoE damage, and it keeps [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] active on you.
4. **Quickness on CD.** [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] every 30 seconds — this is a squad-accelerant, don't hold it.
5. **Cleanse reactively.** F2 and [[skill:Resolute Stance]] are your big cleanse tools. Save them for when you see condition bombs landing, not as a preemptive spend.
6. **Contribute damage.** Spear auto-attacks, Sigil of Fire procs on crits, and [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] explosions add up passively — you're not a pure healer. Stay in the fight.

---

## Positioning

- **300 range matters.** [[skill:Valorous Stance]] and [[trait:Purging Light]] both cap at 300 range. You need to be within ~300 units of the 4 players you're supporting when you pop stances. Don't let the blob push you 600+ away from your subgroup.
- **600 range is your safety net.** Both shouts and your elite reach 600 — you have a little more room for those.
- **Stay with the melee train.** This comp is melee-driven. The Luminary supports a melee subgroup, not a ranged backline — plant your feet in the push and cycle stabilities to keep the group on their feet.

---

## Key Combos

- **Stance → boon dump:** Pop [[skill:Valorous Stance]] (which enters the healing-on-boon mode), then immediately stack other boons on your subgroup — the Valorous Stance passive heals allies for every boon you grant while it's active.
- **Cleanse chain:** [[skill:Resolute Stance]] (3 conditions, 360 range) → [[trait:Purging Light]] procs Light Aura (1 more condition) → F2 with [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] (3 conditions, 600 range). That's 7 conditions stripped in a short window if you layer them.
- **Aegis burst:** Spam both charges of [[skill:"Advance!"]] back-to-back → every blocked hit on every target in your subgroup fires [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] AoE → free multi-hit AoE damage from your whole party blocking.

---

## What You Are NOT

- **Not a healer.** Your healing is incidental — raw heal numbers are moderate, and the Magnanimous Oil and Diviner's stats don't stack Healing Power. Your value is boons and cleanse.
- **Not a pure DPS.** You contribute damage, but you're slotted as support. Never sacrifice a Stability rotation to land more spear hits.
- **Not a Firebrand.** The Luminary is a second support source in the subgroup — you're sharing the load with a Troubadour or Druid, not replacing them. Coordinate who covers what.

turns.userText: Spear skills do not reset virtues, going into shroud and using radiant weapons resets cooldowns on virtues
turns.agentText:
Good correction — I misread [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]'s trigger. Let me look up the Luminary's shroud/radiant weapon mechanic so I can describe it accurately before updating the guide.

That's all I need to issue a clean correction. You're right, and I can confirm it now from the API data. Here's what the traits actually say:

- The **minor trait [[trait:Radiant Armaments]]** explicitly references "exiting Radiant Forge," confirming **Radiant Forge is a shroud-like mode** you enter and exit — not a weapon swap.
- The **minor trait [[trait:Light's Gift]]** says "Grant Luminary's Blessing to allies when you **equip a radiant weapon**" — within Radiant Forge you select/switch between radiant weapons.
- [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] reads "reduce the recharge of your virtue skills when you **equip a radiant weapon**" — meaning the trigger is **choosing a radiant weapon inside Radiant Forge**, not swapping to the spear outside of it.

So the corrected core mechanic is:

> **Enter Radiant Forge (the Luminary's shroud equivalent), then equip / switch to a radiant weapon inside it → this is what reduces virtue cooldowns via [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]. Exiting Radiant Forge grants you the Radiant Armaments buff (10 seconds, lingering bonus based on which weapon you had equipped).**

The guide's "Radiant Weapon Swapping" section was describing the right concept — rotate weapon selections while in Radiant Forge to cut virtue CDs — but it wrongly attributed the trigger to your regular spear weapon swap outside of that mode. That section needs to be rewritten to describe the Radiant Forge entry and weapon selection loop instead.

---

One thing I want to nail down before I rewrite it: I currently can't pull the full Radiant Forge skill (the wiki and meta search tools are hitting a module error on my end). Could you tell me:

1. **How many radiant weapons are available inside Radiant Forge** and which types they are (e.g. spear / mace / shield variants)?
2. **Does entering Radiant Forge itself trigger [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]**, or only when you switch weapons *within* it?

That'll let me write the loop correctly rather than guessing.

turns.userText: there are 4 radiant weapons available. Hammer, Staff, Sword, Shield. Entering Radiant Forget does not trigger illuminating Inspiration, only when you use weapons inside of Radiant Forge

Perfect, that's exactly what I needed. Let me pull the radiant weapon skills from the API so I can describe what each one does before rewriting the mechanic section.

Found the hammer and sword radiant skills. Let me dig out the rest of the Radiant Forge weapon skills.

Found the shared auto-attack **Glaring Burst** and the Hammer/Sword skills. Let me find the Staff and Shield radiant weapon skills.

Found **Enter Radiant Forge** (10s CD, 20s duration). Now let me pull the Exit skill and the remaining radiant weapon skills.

I now have what I need. Here is the corrected **Radiant Forge** section, grounded entirely in the API data you've confirmed:

---

## ✦ Corrected: How Radiant Forge Actually Works

### Entering Radiant Forge
**Enter Radiant Forge** (your Profession 4 / F-key shroud button) is a **20-second mode on a 10-second base cooldown**. Entering it does *not* trigger [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — that was wrong in the original guide.

### Inside Radiant Forge — 4 Weapons
Once inside, you have four radiant weapons available to equip: **Hammer, Staff, Sword, and Shield**. Each time you *select and use* one of those weapons, [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] fires — cutting virtue cooldowns by **4s (F1) / 3s (F2) / 2s (F3)** per weapon equip. You can trigger it up to four times per Radiant Forge window, once per weapon.

Two weapons I can confirm from the API:

| Weapon | Key Skill | What It Does |
|---|---|---|
| **Hammer** | Dazzling Hammer | Daze 5 enemies (180 range), grant Might + Fury + Luminary's Blessing + Light Aura to 5 allies (300 range). Blast finisher. → chains to Shining Spin (bonus damage vs disabled foes) |
| **Sword** | Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust | Leap + cripple + vulnerability on target, then bounce a light ray between nearby foes |

The Staff and Shield weapons I could not fully confirm from the API alone — I'd trust your in-game experience on what those do specifically.

All four weapons share **Glaring Burst** as the auto-attack (Weapon 1), whose effect changes based on which radiant weapon you currently have equipped.

### The CD Trade-off — A Mechanic the First Guide Missed
The Enter Radiant Forge CD has a key wrinkle: **for each radiant weapon you leave unused when Radiant Forge ends, the next CD is reduced by 5 seconds (minimum 5s)**. So:

- Use all 4 weapons → full 10s CD next time, but 4 virtue resets
- Leave 1 unused → 5s shorter CD next time, but 3 virtue resets
- Leave all 4 unused → maximally short 5s CD, but zero virtue resets and no trait procs

In a WvW zerg you almost always want to use **at minimum the Hammer** (it's the primary support weapon with daze + boons + blast finisher). How many more you use vs. save is a situational call — in a heavy fight, burn all 4 for maximum virtue cycling; in lighter roaming phases, bank some for a faster next Radiant Forge.

### The Real Rotation Loop

```
[Enter Radiant Forge]
  → Equip Hammer → Dazzling Hammer → virtues reset #1
  → Equip Staff  → use Staff skill → virtues reset #2
  → Equip Sword  → Gleaming Blade  → virtues reset #3
  → Equip Shield → use Shield skill → virtues reset #4
[Exit / wait out duration → Radiant Armaments buff procs (10s lingering bonus)]
[CD reduced by leftover unused weapons → Enter Radiant Forge again]
```

While inside, **use your virtue F-skills between weapon equips** to cash in the freshly-reduced CDs. The point is stacking resets so that F2 (cleanse) and F3 (stability) come back multiple times within a single Radiant Forge window.

---

I'd suggest we treat the rest of the original guide as broadly accurate (stances, shouts, positioning, priority order), with this section replacing the old "Radiant Weapon Swapping" block. If you want me to write the whole thing out clean as a single document with this corrected, just say the word.

# Luminary Guardian — WvW Zerg Support Guide

---

## Role

The Luminary is your subgroup's **boon support Guardian**. It keeps 5 players standing, buffed, and CC-resistant through sustained Stability, condition cleanse, Aegis cycling, Quickness, Fury, and Protection — while contributing real passive damage through [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] and Radiant Forge. It is not a healer and not pure DPS. It is the build that keeps your melee train upright long enough to win the fight.

---

## Gear

### Stats

| Piece | Stat Set |
|---|---|
| Armor (6 pieces) | Diviner's (Power / Precision / Ferocity / Concentration) |
| Weapons | Wanderer's (Power / Vitality / Toughness / Concentration) |
| Rings + Accessories | Wanderer's |
| Amulet + Back | Commander's (Power / Precision / Toughness / Concentration) |

The Diviner's armor gives you power, crits, and Concentration. Wanderer's on jewelry and weapons adds survivability through Vitality and Toughness — which the Magnanimous Maintenance Oil then converts directly back into Concentration. Your durability feeds your boon uptime.

### Upgrades

| Slot | Item |
|---|---|
| Rune (6×) | [[item:Superior Rune of Fireworks]] (+175 Power total, +25% Boon Duration total) |
| Infusions (18×) | [[item:Concentration WvW Infusion]] (+5 Concentration each = +90 total, −1% damage from guards) |
| Food | Spiced Peppercorn Cheesecake (ascended feast) |
| Utility | [[item:Magnanimous Maintenance Oil]] (Concentration = 3% Vitality + 3% Toughness) |
| Relic | Relic of the Brawler |

### Weapons

| Set | Weapons | Sigils |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Spear | [[item:Superior Sigil of Fire]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] |
| 2 | Mace / Shield | [[item:Superior Sigil of Accuracy]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Bloodlust]] / [[item:Superior Sigil of Bloodlust]] |

**Bloodlust** stacks +10 Power per kill (+50 per player kill), up to 25 stacks (+250 Power). Cap these early in a session — they drop on death. **Sigil of Fire** procs a flame AoE blast (240 radius) on critical hits with a 5s ICD, adding passive cleave pressure. **Sigil of Accuracy** gives +7% crit chance to keep Fire proccing and [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] active.

---

## Traits

### Zeal

- [[trait:Fiery Wrath]] — +5% strike damage against burning foes. Pairs with Sigil of Fire procs.
- [[trait:Zealous Blade]] — +120 Power, flat.
- [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — When aegis *you applied* blocks an attack, it explodes for AoE damage in a 240 radius. You continuously apply Aegis via [[skill:"Advance!"]] and F3's passive, so this procs constantly and freely. Meaningful damage contribution that costs you nothing extra.

### Virtues

- [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] — +7% strike damage while you have Aegis, +7% while above 90% HP. You're near-permanently Aegised through [[skill:"Advance!"]] charges and F3's passive. Treat this as a passive damage buff.
- [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] — Activating F2 (Virtue of Resolve) removes **3 conditions** from 5 nearby allies within 600 range. Also strengthens the F2 passive regen by 25%.
- [[trait:Indomitable Courage]] — Activating F3 (Virtue of Courage) grants **3× Stability (4s) + stun break** to 5 nearby allies within 600 range. F3's passive automatically applies Aegis to nearby allies every 30s.

### Luminary (Elite)

- [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] — Every Stance you use grants **3s Protection** to allies and **3s Blind** to enemies. Both of your utility stances and your heal are Stances, so this fires constantly throughout a fight.
- [[trait:Purging Light]] — Using your heal skill gives you Light Aura and removes **1 condition** from 5 nearby allies within 300 range. Light Aura also reduces incoming condition damage by 10% while active.
- [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — **Equipping a radiant weapon inside Radiant Forge** reduces all virtue cooldowns: **4s off F1 / 3s off F2 / 2s off F3**. This is the spec's core engine — see Radiant Forge below.

---

## Skills

### Regular Skills

| Skill | Type | CD | What It Does |
|---|---|---|---|
| [[skill:Resolute Stance]] | Heal / Stance | 30s | Heals you (~6,550), heals 5 allies (~3,350), removes **3 conditions** from allies in 360 range. [[trait:Shimmering Stances]]: grants 3s Protection to allies and Blinds nearby enemies. [[trait:Purging Light]]: removes 1 more condition from 5 allies in 300 range and applies Light Aura. |
| [[skill:"Advance!"]] | Shout | 2 charges / 24s each | Grants **Aegis + Swiftness (20s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. 2 charges — use both freely. |
| [[skill:Valorous Stance]] | Stance | 25s | Grants **5× Stability (4s) + Protection (7s with [[trait:Shimmering Stances]])** to 5 allies in 300 range. While active: heals allies whenever you grant them boons. Also Blinds nearby enemies. |
| [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] | Shout | 24s | **Stun break.** Grants **5× Stability (6s) + Resolution (5s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |
| [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] | Elite Shout | 30s | Grants **Quickness (3s) + Fury (10s) + Superspeed (4s)** to 5 allies in 600 range. |

*Skill values are from the PvE API — WvW values may differ.*

### Virtue F-Skills

| Virtue | Passive | Active (with trait) |
|---|---|---|
| F1 — Virtue of Justice | Periodically burns nearby enemies | Applies burning to all attacks briefly |
| F2 — Virtue of Resolve | 25%-stronger passive regen ([[trait:Absolute Resolve]]) | Removes **3 conditions** from 5 allies in 600 range |
| F3 — Virtue of Courage | Passive **Aegis** to nearby allies every 30s | **3× Stability (4s) + stun break** to 5 allies in 600 range |

---

## Radiant Forge — The Core Mechanic

**Enter Radiant Forge** is your Profession 4 button — the Luminary's shroud equivalent. It is a **20-second mode on a 10-second base cooldown.** Entering Radiant Forge by itself does **not** trigger [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]].

### Inside Radiant Forge

You have four radiant weapons available: **Hammer, Staff, Sword, and Shield.** Each time you *equip and use* one of these weapons, two things fire simultaneously:

1. **[[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]** — −4s F1 / −3s F2 / −2s F3
2. **Light's Gift (minor trait)** — Grants **Luminary's Blessing** (reduced incoming strike damage + heals on expiry) to 5 nearby allies in 300 range

Use your F-skills **between weapon equips** to cash in the freshly-reduced cooldowns. You can get up to four virtue resets per Radiant Forge window — one per weapon.

**What each weapon does (confirmed from API):**

| Weapon | Key Skill | Function |
|---|---|---|
| **Hammer** | Dazzling Hammer | **2s AoE Daze** on up to 5 enemies (180 range) + **Might + Fury + Luminary's Blessing + Light Aura** to 5 allies (300 range). **Blast finisher.** Chains to Shining Spin (bonus damage vs. disabled foes). **Use this one every Radiant Forge window.** |
| **Sword** | Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust | Leap to target + Cripple + Vulnerability, then a bouncing light ray between nearby enemies. More damage-oriented. |
| **Staff** | — | Confirm in-game |
| **Shield** | — | Confirm in-game |

All four share **Glaring Burst** as Weapon 1 — an auto-attack whose effect changes based on whichever radiant weapon you currently have equipped.

### The CD Trade-off

Radiant Forge's recharge is **reduced by 5 seconds for each weapon you leave unused when you exit** (minimum 5s CD overall):

| Weapons used | CD reduction | Next CD |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | −20s | 5s (floor) |
| 1 | −15s | 5s (floor) |
| 2 | −10s | 5s (floor) |
| 3 | −5s | 5s (floor) |
| 4 | −0s | 10s |

**In a heavy fight:** Use all 4 weapons. Maximum virtue resets and Luminary's Blessing applications are worth the full 10s CD.

**In lighter phases:** Leave 1–2 weapons unused. Getting Radiant Forge back in 5s means more Dazzling Hammer dazes and Luminary's Blessing pulses over time, which can outweigh a slightly shorter virtue reset chain.

### Rotation Inside Radiant Forge

```
[Enter Radiant Forge]
  → Equip Hammer → Dazzling Hammer (daze + boons + blast) → virtue reset #1 → F2/F3 if available
  → Equip Staff  → Staff skill                            → virtue reset #2 → F2/F3 if available
  → Equip Sword  → Gleaming Blade                        → virtue reset #3 → F2/F3 if available
  → Equip Shield → Shield skill                          → virtue reset #4 → F2/F3 if available
[Exit / duration expires]
  → Radiant Armaments buff: 10s lingering bonus from your last equipped weapon
  → CD reduced by any unused weapons → re-enter when ready
```

---

## Boons You Provide Your Subgroup

| Boon / Effect | Sources |
|---|---|
| **Stability** | [[skill:Valorous Stance]], [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]], F3 active |
| **Protection** | [[skill:Valorous Stance]], [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] (every Stance), Dazzling Hammer |
| **Aegis** | [[skill:"Advance!"]] (2 charges), F3 passive (every 30s) |
| **Quickness** | [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] |
| **Fury** | [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]], Dazzling Hammer |
| **Resolution** | [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] |
| **Swiftness** | [[skill:"Advance!"]] |
| **Luminary's Blessing** | Each radiant weapon equip inside Radiant Forge (Light's Gift) |
| **Condition Cleanse** | [[skill:Resolute Stance]] (3), F2 active (3), [[trait:Purging Light]] (1 per heal) |

---

## Priority Order in a Fight

**1 — Stability (always first)**
Rotate [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] → F3 active in sequence. These three have overlapping windows if managed properly. A subgroup without stability gets CC'd and dies inside the blob — nothing else matters if this slips.

**2 — Radiant Forge**
Enter whenever it comes off cooldown. Inside, use the Hammer first every time (daze + boon burst + blast finisher), then work through remaining weapons while spending freshly-reset virtue CDs between each swap.

**3 — Aegis cycling**
[[skill:"Advance!"]] has 2 charges on ~24s recharge. Use them on cooldown — don't hold both. Every aegis on a subgroup member is a potential [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] detonation, and it keeps [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] active on you.

**4 — Quickness on cooldown**
[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] every 30s. This speeds up your whole subgroup's actions — never hold it.

**5 — Condition cleanse reactively**
F2 and [[skill:Resolute Stance]] are your burst cleanses. Save them for when condition bombs actually land on your subgroup, not as a preemptive spend. [[trait:Purging Light]] gives you a small passive cleanse every time you use your heal.

**6 — Damage**
Spear auto-attacks, Sigil of Fire crits, Dazzling Hammer inside Radiant Forge, and [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] procs all add up passively. You are not a spectator. Stay in the fight and let your kit do the rest.

---

## Key Synergies

**Valorous Stance → Boon Dump**
Pop [[skill:Valorous Stance]] first to enter the boon-healing mode, *then* immediately fire your other boon-granting skills. Every boon you apply to allies while Valorous Stance is active heals them. The more boons you stack immediately after, the more healing pulses.

**Full Cleanse Chain**
[[skill:Resolute Stance]] (3 conditions, 360 range) → [[trait:Purging Light]] procs Light Aura (1 condition) → F2 with [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] (3 conditions, 600 range). Up to 7 conditions stripped in a tight window when your subgroup is being bombed.

**Aegis Burst → Shattered Aegis Chain**
Burn both charges of [[skill:"Advance!"]] back-to-back. Every blocked attack on every target in your subgroup detonates [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] for AoE damage — one proc per block per player. In a 5-person subgroup taking a coordinated hit, this multiplies fast.

---

## Positioning

- **Stay within 300 range of your subgroup.** [[skill:Valorous Stance]], [[trait:Purging Light]], Luminary's Blessing (Light's Gift), and Dazzling Hammer all cap at 300 range. If you're even slightly out of position, these miss the people you're there to protect.

## Radiant Forge — The Core Mechanic

**Enter Radiant Forge** is your Profession 4 button — the Luminary's shroud equivalent. It is a **20-second mode on a 10-second base cooldown.** Entering Radiant Forge by itself does **not** trigger [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]].

### Skill Layout Inside Radiant Forge

Radiant Forge gives you a fixed 5-skill layout. Skills 2–4 change based on which of the four radiant weapons you have equipped (Hammer, Staff, Sword, Shield). **Skills 1 and 5 are always available regardless of which weapon is selected:**

| Skill Slot | Skill | Always/Weapon |
|---|---|---|
| **1** | Glaring Burst | Always — auto-attack whose burst effect changes per equipped weapon |
| **2** | Weapon-specific | Changes per radiant weapon |
| **3** | Weapon-specific | Changes per radiant weapon |
| **4** | Weapon-specific | Changes per radiant weapon |
| **5** | **Radiant Bulwark** | Always — see below |

### Radiant Bulwark — Skill 5 (25s CD)

*"Block attacks. Grants Aegis to nearby allies on activation."*

- **Blocks all attacks for 2 seconds** on yourself
- On activation: grants **Aegis (4s)** to **5 allies in 300 range**
- This is your biggest single damage-mitigation tool. Pop it the moment you see a bomb incoming — you absorb the hit entirely while simultaneously giving your whole subgroup a block layer. Every blocked hit from your allies also detonates [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] for free AoE damage. **Use this on cooldown**, not as a last resort.

### The Four Radiant Weapons

Each time you *equip and use* a radiant weapon (skills 2–4), two things fire simultaneously:
1. **[[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]** — −4s F1 / −3s F2 / −2s F3
2. **Light's Gift (minor trait)** — grants **Luminary's Blessing** (reduced incoming strike damage + heals on expiry) to 5 nearby allies in 300 range

Use F-skills **between weapon equips** to cash in the freshly-reduced cooldowns. Up to four resets per Radiant Forge window.

| Weapon | Key Skill | Function |
|---|---|---|
| **Hammer** | Dazzling Hammer | **2s AoE Daze** on 5 enemies (180 range) + **Might + Fury + Luminary's Blessing + Light Aura** to 5 allies (300 range). **Blast finisher.** Chains to Shining Spin (bonus damage vs. disabled foes). **Use this every window.** |
| **Sword** | Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust | Leap to target + Cripple + Vulnerability, then a bouncing light ray between nearby enemies. More damage-oriented. |
| **Staff** | — | Confirm in-game |
| **Shield** | — | Confirm in-game |

### The CD Trade-off

Radiant Forge's recharge is **reduced by 5 seconds for each radiant weapon left unused when you exit** (minimum 5s overall CD):

| Weapons used | Next CD |
|---|---|
| 0 | 5s (floor) |
| 1–2 | 5s (floor) |
| 3 | 5s (floor) |
| 4 | 10s |

**In a heavy fight:** Use all 4 weapons. Maximum virtue resets and Luminary's Blessing applications are worth the full 10s CD.

**In lighter phases:** Leave 1–2 weapons unused. Getting Radiant Forge back in ~5s means more frequent Dazzling Hammer dazes and Radiant Bulwark blocks, which can outweigh a slightly shorter virtue reset chain.

### Rotation Template Inside Radiant Forge

```
[Enter Radiant Forge]
  → Skill 5: Radiant Bulwark (if a burst is incoming — block + Aegis to allies)
  → Equip Hammer → Dazzling Hammer (daze + boons + blast) → virtue reset #1
      → spend F2 or F3 immediately if available
  → Equip Staff  → Staff skill             → virtue reset #2
      → spend F2 or F3 immediately if available
  → Equip Sword  → Gleaming Blade          → virtue reset #3
      → spend F2 or F3 immediately if available
  → Equip Shield → Shield skill            → virtue reset #4
      → spend F2 or F3 immediately if available
[Exit / duration expires]
  → Radiant Armaments buff: 10s lingering bonus from last equipped weapon
  → CD reduced by unused weapons → re-enter when available
```

If a burst lands while you're inside Radiant Forge and Radiant Bulwark is up, interrupt the weapon rotation to pop it — survival first, resets second.

Rotate [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → [[skill:"Stand Your Ground!"]] → F3 active in sequence. These three have overlapping windows if managed properly. A subgroup without Stability gets CC'd and dies inside the blob. Nothing else matters if this slips.

[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] every 30s. Don't hold it.

F2 and [[skill:Resolute Stance]] are your burst cleanses. Save them for when condition bombs land on your subgroup, not speculatively. [[trait:Purging Light]] provides a small passive cleanse each time you heal.

**Not a healer.** Heal output is moderate and you carry no Healing Power. Your value is boons, blocks, and cleanse — a properly supported subgroup doesn't need heavy direct healing.

**Not pure DPS.** You output real damage through Radiant Forge, [[trait:Shattered Aegis]], and spear pressure, but you are slotted as support. Never sacrifice a Stability rotation or Radiant Bulwark to land more hits.

## Radiant Forge — Core Mechanic

### Entering and Exiting
Press **F4 (Enter Radiant Forge)** to enter shroud mode. Radiant Forge lasts **20 seconds** with a **10-second base cooldown**. While inside, your weapon skills are replaced with 4 selectable radiant weapons (Hammer, Staff, Sword, Shield) plus two fixed skills:

- **Skill 1 — Glaring Burst:** Radiant auto-attack (always available)
- **Skill 5 — Radiant Bulwark (77197):** 2-second personal block + Aegis (4s) to 5 allies in 300 range; 25s CD. **Use whenever heavy incoming hits are expected — this is a major mitigation tool, not just a cooldown button.**

### The Cooldown Trade-off
Each radiant weapon you leave **unused** on exit reduces the next cooldown by 5 seconds (minimum 5s floor). Using all 4 weapons = full 10s CD; using none = 5s CD. You don't always need to equip every weapon — manage exits to stay ahead on Virtue CDs without unnecessarily extending your Forge downtime.

### [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Virtue CD Reduction
**Equipping a radiant weapon INSIDE Radiant Forge** triggers this trait, reducing:
- F1 by **4 seconds**
- F2 by **3 seconds**
- F3 by **2 seconds**

This fires once per weapon equipped — entering Radiant Forge alone does **not** trigger it. With 4 weapons equipped across one Forge window you shave up to 8s off F3, keeping Stability cycling faster.

### Light's Gift (Minor Trait)
Each radiant weapon equipped inside Radiant Forge also grants **Luminary's Blessing to 5 allies in 300 range**. Stay stacked with your subgroup when equipping weapons inside Forge.

### Radiant Armaments (Minor Trait)
After exiting Radiant Forge, you keep a **10-second lingering bonus** based on the last weapon equipped. Plan your exit weapon accordingly.

### The Four Radiant Weapons
- **Hammer** — Dazzling Hammer → Shining Spin; melee AoE burst
- **Staff** — Radiant staff skills; confirm specifics in-game
- **Sword** — Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust; single-target melee spike
- **Shield** — Radiant shield skills; confirm specifics in-game

## Stability Priority

# Luminary — WvW Squad Guide

## Overview
Luminary is a Guardian elite specialization built around **Radiant Forge**, a shroud-like mode that replaces your weapon skills with four selectable radiant weapons. Your role is front-line boon support: deliver Stability and Aegis to your subgroup, reduce your Virtue cooldowns inside Radiant Forge to keep F2 and F3 cycling, and contribute melee boons and condition mitigation through your spear.

---

## Stats and Gear

**Stat mix:** Diviner's armor (Power/Concentration/Precision/Ferocity) + Wanderer's weapons and jewelry (Power/Toughness/Vitality/Concentration) + Commander's amulet and back (Power/Precision/Toughness/Concentration)

**Food:** Magnanimous Maintenance Oil — converts Vitality and Toughness into Concentration, pushing your boon duration toward the cap.

**Rune:** [[item:Superior Rune of Fireworks]] — Might, Power, and boon duration.

**Relic:** [[item:Relic of the Brawler]]

**Sigils:**
- Spear: [[item:Superior Sigil of Concentration]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Strength]]
- Mace/Shield: [[item:Superior Sigil of Strength]] + [[item:Superior Sigil of Force]]

**Infusions:** 18× Concentration WvW Infusions

---

## Trait Lines

### Zeal
- **Row 1:** [[trait:Fiery Wrath]] — Bonus damage against burning targets
- **Row 2:** [[trait:Zealous Blade]] — Always grants +120 Power passively. While wielding a Greatsword it also grants an additional +120 Power and 20% weapon skill recharge reduction — since this build uses Spear and Mace/Shield, only the base +120 Power applies.
- **Row 3:** [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — When Aegis you applied blocks a hit, it explodes for AoE damage (240 radius). Triggered by Aegis from "Advance!", F3's passive, and Radiant Bulwark.

### Virtues
- **Row 1:** [[trait:Unscathed Contender]] — Damage bonus while you have Aegis
- **Row 2:** [[trait:Absolute Resolve]] — F2 active removes 3 conditions from 5 allies in 600 range
- **Row 3:** [[trait:Indomitable Courage]] — F3 active grants 3× Stability (4s) + stun break to 5 allies in 600 range; F3 passive grants Aegis every 30s

### Luminary
- **Row 1:** [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Each radiant weapon you equip INSIDE Radiant Forge reduces F1 CD by 4s, F2 by 3s, F3 by 2s
- **Row 2:** [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] — All Stances grant 3s Protection to 5 nearby allies and 3s Blind to 5 nearby enemies
- **Row 3:** [[trait:Purging Light]] — Using your heal grants Light Aura and removes 1 condition from 5 allies in 300 range

---

## Skills

| Slot | Skill | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| Heal | [[skill:Holy Reckoning]] | Grants Light Aura; triggers [[trait:Purging Light]] |
| Utility 1 | [[skill:Valorous Stance]] | Stance → Stability on cast; [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] adds Protection to allies + Blind to enemies |
| Utility 2 | [[skill:Advance!]] | 2 charges; grants Aegis to 5 allies. Use in melee range; stagger charges. |
| Utility 3 | [[skill:Stand Your Ground!]] | Shout → Stability + stun break to 5 allies |
| Elite | [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] | Shout, 30s CD — grants Quickness, Fury (10s), and Superspeed to 5 allies in 600 range. Quickness duration is doubled on yourself. |

---

## Weapons

### Primary — Spear (two-hand)

| Skill | Name | Key Info (WvW) |
|-------|------|----------------|
| 1 | [[skill:Daybreaking Slash]] | Auto-attack chain; wave of light forward, damages enemies, heals allies |
| 2 | [[skill:Helio Rush]] | Charge forward through enemies/allies; 2 charges, 8s recharge; grants Illuminated on hit |
| 3 | [[skill:Gleaming Disc]] | Whirl spin + shock wave; 12s CD; grants Fury (10s) + 6× Might (10s) to allies, 3s Blind to enemies; Whirl finisher |
| 4 | [[skill:Solar Storm]] | Ground-targeted AoE shards; 15s CD; removes 2 conditions from allies; grants Illuminated to self |
| 5 | [[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] | Light field symbol; **25s CD (WvW)**; knocks back enemies on cast; pulses 2s Resistance to allies every 6s + Weakness to enemies; auto-illuminates all spear skills while you stand in it |

### Secondary — Mace/Shield
Swap for extra front-line mitigation. [[skill:Shield of Absorption]] provides a projectile bubble for your subgroup.

---

## Radiant Forge — Core Mechanic

### Entering and Exiting
Press **F4 (Enter Radiant Forge)** to enter shroud mode. Radiant Forge lasts **20 seconds** with a **10-second base cooldown**. While inside, your weapon skills are replaced with 4 selectable radiant weapons (Hammer, Staff, Sword, Shield) plus two fixed skills:

- **Skill 1 — Glaring Burst:** Radiant auto-attack, always available
- **Skill 5 — Radiant Bulwark:** 2-second personal block + Aegis (4s) to 5 allies in 300 range; 25s CD. Use whenever heavy incoming hits are expected — this is a major damage mitigation tool, not just a cooldown button.

### The Cooldown Trade-off
Each radiant weapon you leave **unused** on exit reduces the next cooldown by 5 seconds (minimum 5s floor). Using all 4 weapons = full 10s CD; using none = 5s CD. You don't always need to equip every weapon — manage your exits to stay ahead on Virtue CDs without unnecessarily extending your Forge downtime.

### [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Virtue CD Reduction
**Equipping a radiant weapon INSIDE Radiant Forge** triggers this trait, reducing:
- F1 by **4 seconds**
- F2 by **3 seconds**
- F3 by **2 seconds**

This fires once per weapon equipped. Entering Radiant Forge alone does **not** trigger it — only the act of equipping a weapon inside does. With 4 weapons equipped across one Forge window you shave up to 8s off F3, keeping Stability cycling faster.

### Light's Gift (Minor Trait)
Each radiant weapon equipped inside Radiant Forge also grants **Luminary's Blessing to 5 allies in 300 range**. Stay stacked with your subgroup when equipping weapons inside Forge.

### Radiant Armaments (Minor Trait)
After exiting Radiant Forge, you retain a **10-second lingering bonus** based on the last radiant weapon you equipped. Plan your exit weapon accordingly.

### The Four Radiant Weapons
- **Hammer** — Dazzling Hammer → Shining Spin; melee AoE burst
- **Staff** — Radiant staff skills; confirm specifics in-game
- **Sword** — Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust; single-target melee spike
- **Shield** — Radiant shield skills; confirm specifics in-game

---

## Stability Priority

Stability is your primary contribution. The moment an engagement opens:

1. **F3 active (Indomitable Courage) — FIRST, always.** Instant, 600 range. 3× Stability (4s) + stun break to 5 allies. Use this before anything else at the start of every engagement.
2. **[[skill:Valorous Stance]]** — Stability on cast; [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] adds 3s Protection to allies + 3s Blind to enemies.
3. **[[skill:Stand Your Ground!]]** — Stability + stun break to 5 allies.
4. **Sustain** by rotating Valorous Stance → Stand Your Ground! between F3 windows.
5. **[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]]** — Use on cooldown; Quickness helps your subgroup land burst faster and Fury stacks with other sources.
6. **Radiant Forge** — Each weapon equip inside reduces F3 CD by 2s, bringing Stability back up faster.

---

## Aegis Priority

Aegis triggers [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — when the Aegis you applied blocks a hit, it explodes for AoE damage in 240 radius. Your Aegis sources:
- **[[skill:Advance!]]** (2 charges)
- **F3 passive** (every 30s via [[trait:Indomitable Courage]])
- **Radiant Bulwark** (Skill 5 inside Radiant Forge)

**Rules:**
- **Only apply Aegis when in melee range of the enemy.** [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] only triggers on incoming hits — applying from range wastes the explosion.
- **Do not overlap Aegis applications.** A second application is completely wasted if the first hasn't been consumed by blocking a hit or expiring. Stagger your "Advance!" charges with a gap between them.

---

## Spear Burst Combo — 5→4→3

When you have a window to push damage, cast in this order:

1. **[[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] (Skill 5, 25s CD WvW)** — Plant the symbol on the enemy cluster. The cast knocks back enemies and creates a Light combo field. While you stand inside the symbol, all your spear skills are **automatically illuminated** — no Illuminated proc is consumed, it is free and continuous.

2. **[[skill:Solar Storm]] (Skill 4, 15s CD)** — Fire while standing in the symbol. Removes 2 conditions from allies. In WvW the raw damage is reduced (0.65 coefficient, 40% falloff per hit) — the primary value is condition removal and bonus healing to allies when Illuminated.

3. **[[skill:Gleaming Disc]] (Skill 3, 12s CD)** — Spin inside the symbol. The Whirl finisher fires inside the Light combo field, producing Retaliation pulses for nearby allies. Grants Fury (10s) + 6× Might (10s) to allies and Blinds enemies (3s). In WvW the Illuminated damage bonus is only 10% — the boon delivery and Blind are the real value here, not raw damage.

**Why 5 first:** The symbol's auto-illumination powers both 4 and 3 without spending a separate Illuminated proc. If Symbol of Luminance is on cooldown, use [[skill:Helio Rush]] (Skill 2) first to generate an Illuminated proc before casting 3 or 4.

> ⚠️ The symbol's knockback on cast can push enemies out of melee range — drop it into the blob, not in front of it.

---

## Rotation Summary

**Engage:**
1. F3 active — immediate priority, before anything else
2. Enter melee; cast [[skill:Valorous Stance]] and [[skill:Stand Your Ground!]]
3. [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] — Quickness + Fury + Superspeed to 5 allies
4. Spear burst: [[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] → [[skill:Solar Storm]] → [[skill:Gleaming Disc]]
5. Enter Radiant Forge → equip radiant weapons to reduce Virtue CDs → use Radiant Bulwark (Skill 5) if heavy hits incoming → exit
6. Apply Aegis via [[skill:Advance!]] in melee (stagger charges)
7. F2 when 3+ conditions hit your subgroup
8. Heal when available → Light Aura + 1 condition removed from 5 allies via [[trait:Purging Light]]

**Sustain:**
- Cycle [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → [[skill:Stand Your Ground!]] for continuous Stability
- Use Radiant Forge whenever available to reduce Virtue CDs via [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]]
- Use [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] on cooldown every 30s for Quickness uptime

---

## Key Reminders
- **Stack with your subgroup.** Luminary's Blessing (Light's Gift), Radiant Bulwark's Aegis, and [[trait:Purging Light]]'s cleanse all deliver at 300 range — you must be on top of your 5 to be effective.
- **[[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] is 25s in WvW.** Plan around this longer window; it comes up roughly every other Radiant Forge cycle.
- **Radiant Bulwark is a reactive mitigation button**, not just a cooldown reset tool. Use it on incoming spike damage, not merely to cycle radiant weapons.
- **The spear's value in WvW is boons and utility**, not damage. Might/Fury from [[skill:Gleaming Disc]] and condition removal from [[skill:Solar Storm]] are why you run it — treat the damage as secondary.
- **[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] is a rotation cooldown**, not an emergency button — use it freely every 30s.

## Radiant Forge — Core Mechanic

### Entering and Exiting
Press **F4 (Enter Radiant Forge)** to enter shroud mode. Radiant Forge lasts **20 seconds** with a **10-second base cooldown**. While inside, your weapon skills are replaced with 4 selectable radiant weapons (Hammer, Staff, Sword, Shield) plus two fixed skills:

- **Skill 1 — Glaring Burst:** Radiant auto-attack, always available
- **Skill 5 — Radiant Bulwark:** 2-second personal block + Aegis (4s) to 5 allies in 300 range; 25s CD. Use whenever heavy incoming hits are expected — this is a major damage mitigation tool, not just a cooldown button.

### The Cooldown Trade-off
Each radiant weapon you leave **unused** on exit reduces the next cooldown by 5 seconds (minimum 5s floor). Using all 4 weapons = full 10s CD; using none = 5s CD. You don't always need to equip every weapon — manage your exits to stay ahead on Virtue CDs without unnecessarily extending your Forge downtime.

### [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]] — Virtue CD Reduction
**Equipping a radiant weapon INSIDE Radiant Forge** triggers this trait, reducing:
- F1 by **4 seconds**
- F2 by **3 seconds**
- F3 by **2 seconds**

This fires once per weapon equipped. Entering Radiant Forge alone does **not** trigger it — only the act of equipping a weapon inside does. With 4 weapons equipped across one Forge window you shave up to 8s off F3, keeping Stability cycling faster.

### Light's Gift (Minor Trait)
Each radiant weapon equipped inside Radiant Forge also grants **Luminary's Blessing to 5 allies in 300 range**. Stay stacked with your subgroup when equipping weapons inside Forge.

### Radiant Armaments (Minor Trait)
After exiting Radiant Forge, you retain a **10-second lingering bonus** based on the last radiant weapon you equipped. Plan your exit weapon accordingly.

### The Four Radiant Weapons
- **Hammer** — Dazzling Hammer → Shining Spin; melee AoE burst
- **Staff** — Radiant staff skills; confirm specifics in-game
- **Sword** — Gleaming Blade → Lucent Thrust; single-target melee spike
- **Shield** — Radiant shield skills; confirm specifics in-game

## Stability Priority

Your goal is **continuous Stability coverage**, not front-loading. Watch the Stability duration on your allies' buff bars and fire the next source just before the current one expires — stacking them back to back wastes the overlap and leaves a gap later.

**Sources, in priority order:**
1. **F3 active ([[trait:Indomitable Courage]]) — FIRST at every engage.** Instant, 600 range, 3× Stability (4s) + stun break to 5 allies.
2. **[[skill:Valorous Stance]]** — Fire as F3 Stability is about to expire. Grants Stability on cast; [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] adds 3s Protection to allies + 3s Blind to enemies.
3. **[[skill:Stand Your Ground!]]** — Fire as Valorous Stance Stability is about to expire. Stability + stun break.
4. **Repeat** — cycle back to F3 (shortened by Radiant Forge) → Valorous Stance → Stand Your Ground! to maintain gapless coverage.
5. **[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]]** — Weave in on cooldown around the Stability rotation; it does not grant Stability so it does not disrupt the chain.
6. **Radiant Forge** — Use between Stability casts to reduce F3 CD via [[trait:Illuminating Inspiration]], shortening the gap before F3 is available again.

## Aegis Priority

Aegis triggers [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] — when the Aegis you applied blocks a hit, it explodes for AoE damage in 240 radius. Your Aegis sources across both weapon sets:

| Source | Delivery |
|--------|----------|
| [[skill:Advance!]] | 2 charges, 5 allies |
| F3 passive ([[trait:Indomitable Courage]]) | Every 30s, 5 allies |
| Radiant Bulwark | On cast inside Radiant Forge, 5 allies in 300 range |
| [[skill:Protector's Strike]] (Mace 3) | On cast, 5 allies in 240 range |
| [[skill:Shield of Judgment]] (Shield 4) | On cast, 5 allies at 600 range |

**Rules:**
- **Only apply Aegis when in melee range of the enemy.** [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] only triggers on incoming hits — applying from range wastes the explosion.
- **Do not overlap Aegis applications.** A second application is completely wasted if the first hasn't been consumed by blocking a hit or expiring. Stagger applications across all your sources.

## Spear Burst Combo — 5→4→3

When you have a window to push damage, cast in this order:

1. **[[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] (Skill 5, 25s CD WvW)** — Plant the symbol on the enemy cluster. The cast knocks back enemies and creates a Light combo field. While you stand inside the symbol, all your spear skills are **automatically illuminated** — no Illuminated proc is consumed, it is free and continuous.

2. **[[skill:Solar Storm]] (Skill 4, 15s CD)** — Fire while standing in the symbol. Removes 2 conditions from allies and deals AoE damage. The Illuminated version fires extra shards and heals allies when conditions are removed.

3. **[[skill:Gleaming Disc]] (Skill 3, 12s CD)** — Spin inside the symbol. The Whirl finisher fires inside the Light combo field, producing Retaliation pulses for nearby allies. Grants Fury (10s) + 6× Might (10s) to allies and Blinds enemies (3s).

**Why 5 first:** The symbol's auto-illumination powers both 4 and 3 without spending a separate Illuminated proc. If Symbol of Luminance is on cooldown, use [[skill:Helio Rush]] (Skill 2) first to generate an Illuminated proc before casting 3 or 4.

> ⚠️ The symbol's knockback on cast can push enemies out of melee range — drop it into the blob, not in front of it.

## Rotation Summary

**Engage:**
1. **F3 active** — first skill used, every time. Stability + stun break to 5 allies at 600 range.
2. Begin auto-attacking with spear and weave in the burst combo, Aegis sources, and [[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] while watching the Stability timer on your allies.
3. As F3 Stability is **about to expire**, cast [[skill:Valorous Stance]] — wait for the handoff, do not cast it immediately after F3.
4. As Valorous Stance Stability is **about to expire**, cast [[skill:Stand Your Ground!]] — again, wait for the handoff moment.
5. Enter Radiant Forge between Stability handoffs — equip radiant weapons to reduce F3 CD, use Radiant Bulwark on incoming spike damage, then exit.
6. **Spear burst** when available: [[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] → [[skill:Solar Storm]] → [[skill:Gleaming Disc]].
7. **Aegis** via [[skill:Advance!]] in melee; stagger charges and all other Aegis sources so they do not overlap.
8. **F2** when conditions hit your subgroup.
9. **[[skill:Resolute Stance]]** when available — heals + removes 3 conditions + Protection + Blind via [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] + Light Aura via [[trait:Purging Light]].

**On Mace/Shield:**
- [[skill:Protector's Strike]] (Mace 3) proactively pre-Aegises your subgroup and punishes incoming attacks with Protection
- [[skill:Shield of Judgment]] (Shield 4) at 600 range for Protection + Aegis when you cannot be in melee
- [[skill:Shield of Absorption]] (Shield 5) to deny incoming projectile volleys and knock back tight enemy clusters
- [[skill:Symbol of Faith]] (Mace 2) for sustained healing and Regeneration; also a Light combo field

**Stability handoff cadence (sustain):**
F3 active → *wait* → [[skill:Valorous Stance]] → *wait* → [[skill:Stand Your Ground!]] → *wait* → F3 again (shortened by Radiant Forge). Each skill fires just before the previous Stability expires — the goal is gapless coverage, not front-loaded stacking.

## Key Reminders
- **Never stack Stability skills back to back.** Watch the Stability timer on your allies and chain each source just before the previous expires — wasted overlap is wasted coverage.
- **Stack with your subgroup.** Luminary's Blessing (Light's Gift), Radiant Bulwark's Aegis, and [[trait:Purging Light]]'s cleanse all deliver at 300 range — you must be on top of your 5 to be effective.
- **[[skill:Resolute Stance]] is a Stance** — it triggers [[trait:Shimmering Stances]] in addition to healing and removing 3 conditions. Use it proactively under pressure, not just when low on health.
- **Mace/Shield gives you five Aegis sources total** across both weapon sets — stagger them to maximise [[trait:Shattered Aegis]] triggers rather than overlapping.
- **[[skill:Symbol of Luminance]] is 25s in WvW.** Plan around this longer window; it comes up roughly every other Radiant Forge cycle.
- **Radiant Bulwark is a reactive mitigation button**, not just a cooldown reset tool. Use it on incoming spike damage, not merely to cycle radiant weapons.
- **[[skill:"Feel My Wrath!"]] is a rotation cooldown**, not an emergency button — use it freely every 30s.
